PORT.description: Port Mattermost listens on inside the container.

MM_SERVICESETTINGS_LISTENADDRESS.description: Internal listen address for the Mattermost HTTP server.

MM_SERVICESETTINGS_SITEURL.description: Publicly accessible URL of your Mattermost instance (update after deploy with your Railway domain).

MM_SQLSETTINGS_DRIVERNAME.description: Database driver. Set to 'postgres' when using the Railway-managed Postgres service.

MM_SQLSETTINGS_DATASOURCE.description: Full Postgres connection string. References the Railway-managed Postgres service.

MM_SERVICESETTINGS_ALLOWCORSFROM.description: Comma-separated list of origins allowed to make cross-origin requests. Leave empty to restrict to SITEURL only.

MM_EMAILSETTINGS_SMTPSERVER.description: SMTP server hostname for outbound email (e.g. smtp.sendgrid.net). Leave empty to disable email.

MM_EMAILSETTINGS_SMTPPORT.description: SMTP server port (typically 587 for TLS, 465 for SSL).

MM_EMAILSETTINGS_SMTPUSERNAME.description: SMTP username / API key for authenticating with the mail provider.

MM_EMAILSETTINGS_SMTPPASSWORD.description: SMTP password for outbound email. Auto-generated placeholder — replace with your actual SMTP credential.

MM_EMAILSETTINGS_FEEDBACKEMAIL.description: From address used in system-generated emails (e.g. noreply@example.com).
